Tests for the `isPrototypeOf` method in various JavaScript object scenarios.


## Files
- **[15.02.04.06-001.js](15.02.04.06-001.js.md)**: Tests the `isPrototypeOf` method to verify that an object is not a prototype of a number.
- **[15.02.04.06-002.js](15.02.04.06-002.js.md)**: Tests if the prototype of an object is correctly identified using `isPrototypeOf`.
- **[15.02.04.06-003.js](15.02.04.06-003.js.md)**: Tests if `otherObject` is not the prototype of `object` using `isPrototypeOf`.
- **[15.02.04.06-004.js](15.02.04.06-004.js.md)**: Tests the `isPrototypeOf` method on a newly created JavaScript object.
- **[15.02.04.06-005.js](15.02.04.06-005.js.md)**: Tests if an object is not in the prototype chain of another object using `isPrototypeOf`.
- **[15.02.04.06-006.js](15.02.04.06-006.js.md)**: Tests that calling `Object.prototype.isPrototypeOf` with `undefined` throws a `TypeError`.
